name: Pallof Press
form_cues: Cable at sternum height, single handle
Stand perpendicular to the stack, feet shoulder-width
Press straight out from chest — resist rotation back toward the stack
notes: Anti-rotation core. Do prescribed reps each side. Hold each press 1–2 sec at extension.
video_id_query: Pallof Press how to proper form
instructions: Set the cable to roughly sternum height with a single D-handle attached.
Grasp the handle with both hands at your chest, then step away from the stack until there's tension on the cable.
Stand perpendicular to the cable, feet shoulder-width, knees soft, ribs down.
Press the handle straight out in front of your chest. The cable will try to rotate you back toward the stack — resist it.
Hold the extended position for a beat, then return to chest under control. Complete all reps, switch sides.
